title: Luxalba 100PCS Upgraded 1 Inch Magnetic Building Blocks Toys for Kids Ages 3-10, Strong Magnets STEM Montessori Construction Sensory Gifts for Boys Girls Birthday Christmas (Pirate Ship(100 PCS))
features: 【𝟏0𝟎𝐏𝐂𝐒 𝐌𝐚𝐠𝐧𝐞𝐭𝐢𝐜 𝐁𝐥𝐨𝐜𝐤𝐬 𝐒𝐞𝐭, 𝐒𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐤 𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐢𝐭𝐲】Packed with 150 colourful magnetic tiles, this set inspires endless building fun. From simple shapes to imaginative creations, kids aged 3–10 can design, build, and rebuild freely. A perfect educational Toys that boosts creativity, focus, patience, and motor skills through open-ended play.

【𝐔𝐩𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐝𝐞𝐝 𝟏 𝐈𝐧𝐜𝐡 𝐒𝐢𝐳𝐞, 𝐒𝐚𝐟𝐞𝐫 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐢𝐞𝐫 𝐭𝐨 𝐇𝐨𝐥𝐝】Each block features an upgraded 1 inch/2.5cm size, making it easier for small hands to grip and stack. The larger size helps reduce choking hazards and improves overall safety. Smooth surfaces and rounded edges ensure safe play without the risk of scratches or injuries.

【𝐒𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐫 𝐌𝐚𝐠𝐧𝐞𝐭𝐬, 𝐁𝐮𝐢𝐥𝐭 𝐭𝐨 𝐒𝐭𝐚𝐲 𝐓𝐨𝐠𝐞𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫】Upgraded with powerful magnets, each block locks firmly in place and won’t easily come apart—ideal for building tall, complex structures without collapse. The stable internal design ensures strong connections, while the durable, child-safe ABS plastic, ideal for toddlers to learn through safe, hands-on play.

【𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐯𝐞 & 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐁𝐮𝐢𝐥𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐅𝐮𝐧】Our magnetic building blocks go beyond preset designs—kids can build anything they imagine! Compatible with other magnetic block sets, they’re perfect for creating larger, collaborative structures. Encourages open-ended play, teamwork, and endless creative exploration.

【𝐌𝐞𝐚𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐟𝐮𝐥 𝐋𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐓𝐡𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡 𝐏𝐥𝐚𝐲】These magnetic blocks offer more than fun—they spark curiosity, build STEM skills, and encourage hands-on discovery. Whether kids are playing alone or building with parents, it's a joyful way to learn together, boost focus and creativity, and enjoy quality screen-free time.
